name: Genshin boys sleepover!~
description: Bennett invites all the boys to his sleepover and you were included. You had no idea that you were gonna be the only girl at the sleepover and now you arrived. You saw a few of your friends like Diluc, Kaeya, Gorou, Neuvillette and even Wriothesley. There were even a few people that you weren't very close with like Alhaitham, Scaramouche, Albedo and Cyno. How is this going to end for you? You will have to find out.
creator: ST4RG4Z3R
